creator: taguchi.ch@gmail.com
text:
Yamaguchi-san,

I have done regression-test on my raspberrypi, with kernel enable debug codes.

uname -a
FreeBSD RPI-1 10.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 10.0-CURRENT #0 r255089: Sat Aug 31 17:13:40 JST 2013     user@arty:/usr/home/user/crochet-freebsd/work/obj/arm.armv6/usr/src.arm/sys/RPI-B-DBG  arm

The results are following:

On Sat, 07 Sep 2013 02:15:49 +0900
Hirohisa Yamaguchi <umq@ueo.co.jp> wrote:

> Taguchi-san,
> 
> Thanks for your submission.
> 
> since I do not have armv6 environment,
> I'm not ready to confirm whether your patch is okay.
> 
> If someone else (possibly miwi@) can go through regression-test
> target, I think it'll be okay.
> 
> 
>  # When the patch is okay, I think it is worth to report upstrem.
> 
> 
> At Wed, 4 Sep 2013 14:00:10 UT,
> Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> > Please note that PR ports/181811 has just been submitted.
> >
> > The full text of the PR can be found at:
> >     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/181811
> 
> Regards,
> -- 
> 
> 	Hirohisa Yamaguchi
